meta.text:
Mohamed Rusaik

+ Colombo, Sri Lanka # hkmrusaik@gmail.com (cid:132) +94 76 760 5370 (cid:18) mohamedrusaik.com (cid:240) mohamed-rusaik § HKM-Rusaik

Summary
Enthusiastic and dedicated Software Engineer with hands-on experience in software development. I have a strong foundation in programming, problem-solving,
and emerging technologies. Passionate about designing and developing AI-driven, scalable applications that enhance efficiency and user experience. Eager to
apply my skills in an Associate Software Engineer role, contributing to impactful projects while continuously learning and growing in the IT field.

Education
University of Kelaniya, BSc in Information Technology

June 2021 – Jan 2025

• Relevant Coursework: Computer Architecture, Data Structures and ALgorithms, Software Development and Testing, Database Design, Distributed Systems,

System Administration, and Artificial Intelligence.

Experience

Ravana Industries PVT LTD
Associate Software Engineer

Feb 2025 – Present

• Developed a full-stack application using the Frappe Framework (Python-based), implementing robust backend logic and dynamic UI components.
• Worked with MySQL and Redis for efficient data storage and caching, optimizing database queries and improving application performance.
• Developed scalable web applications using Next.js, leveraging server-side rendering (SSR) and static site generation (SSG) for performance optimization.

Built cross-platform mobile applications using React Native, ensuring a seamless user experience on both iOS and Android.

• Automated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, ensuring smooth deployments and continuous integration.
• Managed DevOps on DigitalOcean, handling server configuration, deployments, and monitoring for production readiness.
• Designed and implemented backend services with Java and Spring Boot, focusing on REST API and GraphQL development, authentication, and scalable

architecture.

• Applied Test-Driven Development(TDD) methodologies, using Jest, React Testing Library for frontend testing, and Pytest, JUnit, and Mockito for backend

testing to ensure reliability and maintainability.

Insharp Technologies LLC, USA
Sofware Engineer Intern

July 2024 – Jan 2025
• Crafted user-friendly and responsive web interfaces using React for functionality and Tailwind CSS for modern, consistent styling, while ensuring quality

with a Test-Driven Development (TDD) approach using Jest with React Testing Library for unit testing.

• Enhanced UI performance by 2x by following modern React best practices, such as optimizing component rendering, using lazy loading, and reducing

unnecessary re-renders.

• Constructed the features for cita mobile 2 app using React Native
• Designed and integrated efficient algorithms using Google Maps APIs to create a feature that suggests the best location between two given points.
• Implemented scalable and maintainable backend features with Java and Spring Boot, utilizing design patterns to ensure long-term system efficiency and

flexibility. Used JUnit and Mockito for Test-Driven Development (TDD) to ensure robust and reliable code.

Projects

POS system with Inventory Management

• Built a POS system with inventory management using Java and Spring Boot for the backend, and React for the frontend. Implemented localization and

internationalization techniques to support multiple languages, currencies, and regional formats, ensuring the system is adaptable for global use.

• Tools Used: ReactJs, Redux, Java, SpringBoot, PostgreSQL, REST Api

Web based Management System for a Restaurant

• Engineered a web-based management system for a restaurant by gathering requirements, analyzing, and designing user interfaces with Figma. Used Post-
greSQL and Sequelize ORM for backend development and React with Redux for frontend state management. Automated processes like online ordering, table
reservations, order tracking, and admin access control.

• Tools Used: ReactJs,Tailwind CSS, Redux, NodeJs, ExpressJs, PostgreSQL, Firebase, JWT, AWS S3, REST Api

Ecommerce web-app for a Mobile shop

• Created an e-commerce web application for a mobile shop using Angular, enhancing busines reach and customer engagement. The platform allows users to

browse, search, and purchase products easily, with features like secure payments and order tracking.

• Tools Used: Angular, Java, SpringBoot, MySQL

Real time chat application

• Developed a real-time chat application using React for the frontend and Nest.js for the backend, leveraging Socket.io to implement seamless real-time com-

munication.

• Tools Used: React, NestJs, Socket.io

Skills
Languages: C++, Java, SQL, JavaScript, Typescript, Python
Frontend Frameworks: React, React Native, Angular
Backend Frameworks: Spring, Spring Boot, Node.js, Express.js, NestJs
Database Management Systems: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB
Cloud Computing: AWS (IAM, S3, EC2), Digital Ocean
Authentication and Security: OAuth, Firebase Auth, NextAuth.js, JWT
Version Control and CI/CD: GitHuub, Github Actions, Git Bash
Soft Skills: Problem Solving and critical thinking, Excellent communication, Team working

Certifications

Spring Boot 3 and Spring Framework with Java 5 | CERTIFICATE 2

• Gained proficiency in Spring Framework and Spring Boot, including hands-on experience with TDD using Mockito and JUnit. Learned Spring Security
for authentication and authorization, Spring Data JPA for database management, Hibernate for ORM, Docker for containerization, and Spring AOP for
aspect-oriented programming.

Full-stack web development | CERTIFICATE 2

• Acquired in-depth knowledge of web technologies, including frontend and backend frameworks, system architectures, and development stacks for build-

ing full-stack applications.

Java 17 mastery | CERTIFICATE 2

• Learned advanced Java concepts such as concurrency, multithreading, functional programming, and working with collection frameworks for efficient

data handling.

Mastery Data Structures and Algorithms | CERTIFICATE 2

• Acquired expertise in data structures and algorithms, with a focus on optimizing performance and analyzing computational complexity.

Achievements and Extra curricular activities
Awarded: Colors for Football at University of Kelaniya in 2023
Participated in the National Mathematics Olympiad, representing the Northern Province
Team Captain – Football in Vavuniya Muslim Maha Vidyalaya

Open source Contribution
